from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_ce602527(I):
    x1 = vmirror(I)
    x2 = fgpartition(x1)
    x3 = order(x2, size)
    x4 = last(x3)
    x5 = remove(x4, x3)
    x6 = compose(toindices, normalize)
    x7 = rbind(upscale, TWO)
    x8 = chain(toindices, x7, normalize)
    x9 = x6(x4)
    x10 = rbind(intersection, x9)
    x11 = chain(size, x10, x8)
    x12 = argmax(x5, x11)
    x13 = subgrid(x12, x1)
    O = vmirror(x13)
    return O
